changelog:
v1.4.0 — BLE WiFi provisioning enabled
- Switched platform to pioarduino arduino-esp32 3.x + ESP-IDF 5.x
- BLAST_BLE_PROV compiled in: hub advertises as PROV_BG_XXXX over BLE
- New UDP command WIFI_PROV and HTTP POST /wifi_prov to start prov session
- New HTTP POST /prov_pop_set to rotate PoP (proof-of-possession) code
- New STATUS JSON field 'prov' indicates whether BLE prov is active
- Default PoP is 'blastgate' — change via /prov_pop_set before exposing the hub
- Flash usage: 98% (close to limit — future features may require a larger partition layout)
